handoff_note: Requirements 1-3 are implemented and merged. Reviewer validation (2026-05-29) found an architectural coupling: the generic CodeMirror autocomplete facility lives inside the emoji extension, so mention completion implicitly depends on emoji being loaded. Requirement 4 (+ gap analysis in research.md) captures the decoupling work. Next step: an implementer runs /kiro-spec-design then /kiro-spec-tasks for Requirement 4 only. The emoji 'no completion inside fenced code blocks' behavior is intentional and must be preserved (Req 4 AC 6).
